name: cdrf-expert
description: Expert guidance for DRF class-based views and override hooks in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: DRF class and override guidance for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Helps choose the correct Django REST Framework class-based view, trace request lifecycle and MRO, and select the safest override hook.
defaultPrompt: Should this be APIView or ModelViewSet?
Which hook should I override: create or perform_create?
Trace this DRF method through the MRO.
